title: Adding Form timestamp
excerpt: Hi - a colleague is asking if Monday can show us when a form was filled out by a client (date). Is there anyway to see this or add that functionality? Thanks!

posts.author: MattRWA (Matt Rosine)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - a colleague is asking if Monday can show us when a form was filled out by a client (date). Is there anyway to see this or add that functionality? Thanks!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MattRWA - If you add the Creation Log column to the board that receives the form submissions, you will see the date and time the item was created (and thus when the form was filled out).

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MattRWA

I would echo @PolishedGeek’s suggestion here to use The Creation Log Column to achieve what you’re looking for with the forms!

I hope the answers in this thread are useful.
If so, please don’t forget to mark it as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
